name: (1E)-5-(1-piperidin-4-yl-3-pyridin-4-yl-1H-pyrazol-4-yl)-2,3-dihydro-1H-inden-1-one oxime
description: (1E)-5-(1-piperidin-4-yl-3-pyridin-4-yl-1h-pyrazol-4-yl)-2,3-dihydro-1h-inden-1-one oxime is a solid. This compound belongs to the phenylpyrazoles. These are compounds containing a phenylpyrazole skeleton, which consists of a pyrazole bound to a phenyl group. It targets the protein serine/threonine-protein kinase B-raf.
